channel.title: Frontion News - Global Geopolitics Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇹🇭 Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha Dies at 47 After Years in Coma
item.description: Thailand's Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol, the eldest daughter of King Maha Vajiralongkorn, has died at age 47 after more than three years in a coma. The royal household announced her death on June 12, marking a significant moment for the Thai royal succession.

item.title: ⚔️ Ukraine War Has Lasted Longer Than World War I
item.description: The war in Ukraine has now exceeded the duration of World War I, with parallels emerging between the grinding nature of both conflicts and the way new technologies have reshaped warfare. The milestone underscores the protracted nature of the conflict.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea's Ex-President Yoon Sentenced to 30 Years for Drone Flights Over Pyongyang
item.description: Former South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol has been sentenced to 30 years in prison for ordering military drone flights over North Korea. The court ruled the operation was designed to provoke Pyongyang and create a pretext for martial law.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 US and Iran Haggle Over Frozen Funds as Interim Deal Nears
item.description: Iran and the United States are discussing how to release frozen Iranian funds as both sides work toward an interim deal to end hostilities. Despite ongoing military strikes from both sides, diplomatic efforts have intensified.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇵🇭 China Sanctions Philippine Defense Secretary Over South China Sea Remarks
item.description: China's foreign ministry announced sanctions against Philippine Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro and his close relatives, accusing him of making "erroneous remarks" that undermined China's legitimate interests and bilateral ties.

item.title: 🇩🇪⚔️ German Army Chief Warns Russia Will Be Ready to Attack NATO by 2029
item.description: German army chief Christian Freuding stated Russia will be prepared to attack NATO by 2029, calling it "NATO-agreed intelligence" and the latest in a series of warnings about Russian threat and Europe lack of preparedness.

item.title: 🇰🇷⚖️ Former South Korean President Yoon Given 30 Years Over Pyongyang Drone Plot
item.description: Former South Korean President Yoon, already serving a life sentence for insurrection over his 2024 martial law decree, received an additional 30-year sentence related to a Pyongyang drone plot.

item.title: 🇯🇵🤝 Wartime Apology Author Yohei Kono Dies at 89
item.description: Yohei Kono, the Japanese politician who authored the historic 1993 Kono Statement apologizing to comfort women and served as a bridge between Japan and China, died at 89. He was reportedly planning a trip to ease bilateral tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷💧 Haaretz Analysis: Water Crisis May Bring Iran to Its Knees
item.description: A Haaretz analysis examines how Iran's severe water crisis, exacerbated by mismanagement and drought, poses an existential threat to the regime beyond military conflicts.

item.title: 🇵🇰 At least 15 dead in Pakistan-administered Kashmir protests over reserved legislative seats
item.description: Deadly clashes between protesters and security forces have killed at least 15 people in Pakistan-administered Kashmir. The violence erupted after activists demanded abolition of reserved assembly seats for refugees from Indian-administered Kashmir.

item.title: ⚔️ Russia Has Increased Military Buildup Near NATO Border, Investigation Reveals
item.description: An investigation reveals Russia has significantly increased its military presence near NATO borders, raising concerns about potential escalation with the alliance.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Says US Hegemony Is Biggest Challenge to Peace in First Defence White Paper in Six Years
item.description: In its first defense white paper since 2019, China identified US hegemony as the primary challenge to global peace, signaling an increasingly confrontational stance in international affairs.

item.title: 🇩🇪🪖 German Army Chief Warns Russia Will Be Ready to Attack NATO by 2029
item.description: German army chief Christian Freuding warned that Russia will be prepared to attack NATO by 2029, calling for urgent European rearmament.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇵🇭 China Bars Philippines Defense Chief as South China Sea Spat Sails Onwards
item.description: China has barred Philippine Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro from entry, escalating tensions in the South China Sea dispute between the two nations.

item.title: 🇸🇮 Slovenia Lifts Entry Ban on Russian Officials
item.description: Slovenia's government has lifted its entry ban on Russian officials, marking a shift in the country's approach to Russia sanctions.

item.title: 🇰🇵🇷🇺 North Korea's Kim Voices Full Support for Russia in National Day Message to Putin
item.description: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un expressed full support for Russia in a national day message to Vladimir Putin, highlighting the deepening military cooperation between the two countries.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC Again Lowers 2026 Global Oil Demand Growth Forecast
item.description: OPEC lowered its 2026 global oil demand growth forecast to 970,000 barrels per day, marking the second straight downward revision amid geopolitical uncertainties.

item.title: 🇹🇭 Thai King's Eldest Daughter Dies Aged 47 After Long Illness
item.description: Thailand's royal palace announced that Princess Bajrakitiyabha, the eldest daughter of King Maha Vajiralongkorn, has died at age 47 after a long illness, raising questions about royal succession.

item.title: 🌍 US Plans to Deport Iranians to Central African Republic, Sources Say
item.description: The United States is planning to deport Iranian nationals to the Central African Republic, according to sources, as part of ongoing immigration enforcement actions.

item.title: 🇨🇦🔫 Toronto Police Officer Killed at US Consulate
item.description: A Toronto police officer was killed at the US consulate, prompting a security response and investigation into the incident.

item.title: 🌪️ Severe Weather Storms Midwest, Chicago Area
item.description: Severe weather conditions have battered the Midwest and Chicago area, causing significant damage and disruption.

item.title: 🇬🇧 British Defence Minister Healey Resigns Over Defence Spending
item.description: British Defence Minister John Healey has resigned over disagreements about defence spending levels, creating uncertainty about UK military policy.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's Fars News Agency Says Iran Has Not Yet Agreed Text of MOU with US
item.description: Iran's Fars News Agency reported that Iran has not yet agreed on the text of a memorandum of understanding with the United States, contradicting some reports of an imminent deal.

item.title: 🇩🇴 Dominican Republic Tax Increase on Oil Products
item.description: The Dominican Republic has implemented tax increases on oil products, affecting consumers and businesses in the Caribbean nation.

item.title: 🐄 Screwworm Parasite Threatens Texas Cattle Industry
item.description: A screwworm parasite outbreak is threatening the Texas cattle industry, prompting agricultural officials to respond to the emerging threat.
